recommendations.title: Buy Miami Heat -4.5
recommendations.reason: Recommendation: buy Miami Heat -4.5. The spread is still inside a controlled range and the moneyline agrees, which is usually where favorite-side value is most stable. It gives this team a realistic path to covering without asking them to win by an inflated margin.

recommendations.title: Buy Denver Nuggets +11.5
recommendations.matchup: Denver Nuggets at San Antonio Spurs
recommendations.reason: Recommendation: buy Denver Nuggets +11.5. The number gives a large scoring cushion at near-standard juice, which can be attractive in NBA games where late swings make big favorites harder to trust. That extra room matters most when the underdog can stay competitive for stretches even if they do not win outright.
